About Us The North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services (DHHS) is one of the largest and most complex agencies within the state, employing approximately 17,000 dedicated professionals. jobs.title: Business Analyst (Migration Project) / 100% Remote
jobs.description:
Business Analyst (Migration Project) / 100% Remote / (12 Month Contract)

We are seeking a Business Analyst with deep experience supporting large‑scale enterprise migrations, system integrations, and regulated operational processes. This BA will play a critical role in requirements definition, process mapping, data and system coordination, governance support, and readiness activities throughout this complex and high‑visibility engagement.

The migration aims to modernize and scale the communication fulfillment ecosystem while ensuring regulatory compliance, accuracy, and operational continuity

jobs.title: Senior Project Manager / Business Analyst - Consultant
jobs.description:
Who We Are

Liberum exists to deliver in the environments where most firms struggle. Our clients are public sector agencies navigating enterprise-scale transformations in politically complex, high-stakes environments where the margin for error is thin, and the consequences of failure are public. We believe clients deserve real ownership, not warm bodies and hope.

We’re a team first. Not a loose collection of consultants sharing a logo, but a genuine team that pushes each other’s thinking, pressure-tests each other’s work, and shows up when engagements get hard. The people we hire make the tea
